name: api-flows-registry-shape-parity
description: API_FLOW_REGISTRY holds Python/requests flow functions registered via the @api_flow(name) decorator — the browserless alternative to YAML/Playwright flows. Each function takes no arguments and returns a dict shaped exactly like PlaywrightFlowTool's output ({flow_name, step_results, network_log}), so anomaly_detector and everything downstream of the Flow Runner work unmodified regardless of which tool ran the flow. ApiRequestFlowTool looks the name up, runs it via asyncio.to_thread, and returns {'error': ...} JSON for unknown names or raised exceptions.
invariants: Registered functions must preserve the canonical output shape — shape parity is the whole contract
The registry name is what both manifest.yaml's api_flow: key and ApiRequestFlowTool's flow_name argument refer to
